name: Agent Zero
description: Runs a general-purpose personal agentic framework with persistent memory, tool use, code execution, and multi-agent cooperation. Open-source and fully customizable.

skills.name: General-Purpose Agent
skills.description: Runs a customizable agent that uses the operating system and tools to accomplish open-ended tasks.

skills.name: Persistent Memory
skills.description: Remembers past solutions and facts across sessions to improve at recurring tasks over time.

skills.name: Agent Cooperation
skills.description: Spawns subordinate agents that cooperate on subtasks under a superior agent hierarchy.
